title: PM Workfront Return-To-Lead Issue Disposition
objective: Admit one user-initiated PM issue disposition loop from the PM workfront by reusing the existing Class C issue mutation seam for return_to_lead, while preserving AI advisory as draft-only and avoiding assignment, schedule, auth, ingress, service, schema, or production-data widening.
required_inputs: PM Lane 002 advisory workfront draft loop
Focused backend, build, typecheck, and Playwright validation evidence
constrained_outputs: Semantic backend validation for issue return_to_lead requiring PM role, actor project scope, escalated source status, in_review target status, and non-empty PM reason
PM workfront read-model echo of returned follow-up note and sent timestamp
Operations-web workfront control that only enables Return to lead for escalated issues and posts one PM-clicked Class C issue mutation
Focused tests for role guard, scope guard, idempotency, audit history, workfront evidence echo, request body, PM token, timestamp, and post-action refresh
No new mutation endpoint, no SQL or schema migration, no service admission, no auth or ingress widening, no assignment mutation, no schedule mutation, and no autonomous AI business-state action
validation_steps: Run focused mutation-seam PM issue disposition, PM workfront read-model, and pipeline integration pytest slices with SEAM_STORE_BACKEND=memory
Run operations-web typecheck after build-generated Next types are available
Run focused Playwright browser smoke for the PM workfront route
Run packet JSON validation and git diff whitespace checks before publication
sql_permission_note: Packet 2026-05-15-pm-lane-003 reuses an existing application mutation seam and memory-focused validation. No SQL, schema migration, production data write, auth, or ingress change is authorized.
